characteristics.coat_type: Medium length, wavy to straight double coat

description.overview: The Kuvasz is an ancient Hungarian flock guardian known for its striking white coat and fierce loyalty.
description.temperament: Kuvasz are loyal and protective but independent. They're patient with family but wary of strangers.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, osteochondritis, and thyroid issues.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Need space and a job to do.

verdict.summary: Majestic white Hungarian guardians. Kuvasz are fiercely loyal and protective but need experienced owners who understand livestock guardians.
